Package org.rodinp.internal.core.relations

Class RelationsComputer

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.relations.RelationsComputer
public class RelationsComputer extends Object
Computes the item relations that have been parsed in order to provide internal element types and attribute types with relationship information.
See Also:

      public void setRelations(List<ItemRelation> relations)
      Fills item types involved in the given item relations in with relation information.
      Parameters:
      relations - the item relation that have been parsed and will be filled in the manipulated element types
